title: Savory Gooey Thai Almond Stir-fry
description: A savory and gooey Thai-inspired dish featuring almond extract to add a unique nutty flavor in a quick weeknight dinner option that's also vegan-friendly.

ingredients.name: Dried Shrimp or Vegan Shrimp Alternatives
ingredients.amount: 30g, soaked and drained if using dried

instructions: In a small bowl, mix Vegan Egg Replacer with almond milk to make egg replacer for the creamy sauce.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add sliced mushrooms and sauté until they release their moisture, about 3 minutes.
Stir in red bell pepper and green onions; continue cooking for another minute or so.
If using dried shrimp, soak them first. In a different small bowl, mix Plant-based Cream Cheese with cornstarch, Sesame Seeds, and almond milk until smooth.
Pour the cream cheese sauce over the vegetables and stir well to combine. Cook for 2 minutes on medium heat.
Fold in soaked dried shrimps or vegan shrimp alternatives if using. Add fresh mushrooms and snow peas; toss gently to distribute evenly.
Cook for another minute to allow flavors to meld together, then remove from heat.
Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.
